name: CampaignRequest
description: CampaignRequest schema from AB Tasty Decision API

visitor_id.description: Unique identifier for the application user or website visitor

anonymous_id.description: Identifier for anonymous visitors (e.g., session ID)

context.description: JSON object of key-value pairs describing the user and device context

visitor_consent.description: Determines if visitor has consented to GDPR rules

trigger_hit.description: Determines whether a CAMPAIGN hit should be automatically sent

decision_group.description: Groups visitors to receive the same variation assignment
